text_block_list.text:
I saw Chrono Genesis in the library after classes one day, 
with another horsegirl watching her from afar.

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text: Hmm… Chrono has really become…
choice_data_list: Do you need something from Chrono?

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're her… Yes, I came to return the notebook she 
lent me for studying. It was so neatly organized and really 
helped me out, so I wanted to thank her properly, too…

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
But Chrono seems super focused right now… she feels 
very different from her usual graceful self somehow…

text_block_list.name: Chrono's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'd be bothering her, so it's hard to call out… 
but I have things to get back to. What to do…?
choice_data_list: In that case, I can give it back to her for you.
In that case, I can give it back to her for you.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
This time it's a 1700 m dirt race, clockwise… The center of 
attention is number ten… It's true that her prowess at the front 
can't be ignored after she pulled away to win in her last race…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
But the one I've got my eye on is number six… Even though 
she hasn't been doing well in her last few races, this time 
the distance is shorter. Plus, the track condition is ——

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Eep…! T-Trainer… W-W-When did you get here…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I-I see… So you brought this in her stead…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I feel bad for ignoring her… I got completely absorbed 
in my predictions, and…
choice_data_list: Speaking of, which race were you looking at?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Umm… Today's Semiannual Race Meet. I've formulated 
my rough predictions, so now I want to adjust them by 
watching the runners' conditioning firsthand…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… The pre-race warm-up. I need to get going…!
choice_data_list: <size=40>That sounds interesting, I'll come with you</size>.
<size=40>That sounds interesting, I'll come with you</size>.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Number six' condition… is what I expected… 
Number ten's hip stability and stride… Yeah. With this…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Yes. The favorite is number six. Their toughest opposition 
will be number ten. Six is a solid bet for first, and the battle 
for second will likely be between number ten and twelve…!

Eventually, the warm-up ended and the competitors 
entered the gates one after another. However…
(Pitter… patter…)

Clouds rapidly covered the sky, and rain began to fall 
right as the race started. The spectators scrambled 
for shelter under the roof.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Number six is in second place… She has placed 
on a soft track before, so she's staying calm… 
Considering her past races…
choice_data_list: Chrono, come here, under the roof…!
Chrono, come here, under the roof…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
No…! I'm staying right here…! 
The front row is where I want to be…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
History is filled with fierce battles fought in the rain…! 
Just thinking that this race might eventually become 
one of those battles…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I don't want to take my eyes off it…!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
History is much like those illustrations. Countless dots drawn 
by all those involved in racing, connecting to form lines from 
which a single, massive image emerges.

She had previously mentioned being "captivated by history". 
The passion she was showing now seemed to burn right through 
this rain, proving just how apt her statement truly was ——

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Huh, number three is moving now…!? She caught number six off guard… Woah! Woaah!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Number three… snatched the win…! 
…Amazing! Amazing, amazing!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Number six should have had an aptitude for soft tracks, too…! 
And yet, my predictions were overturned… Ah, if I remember 
correctly… this development…!!

I followed Chrono Genesis into the trainer's room, and found 
her intently watching reference footage of a race.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I knew it…! The race back then also overturned my predictions…! 
Ah, I want to replay that part just now…!
choice_data_list: Here, use this towel. Dry yourself off first.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …Huh? Ah, Trainer. A towel…?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Aaah!? I-I'm so sorry!! I'm soaking wet… and… achoo!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm really sorry… If I got anything else wet, 
I'll clean it up right away…
choice_data_list: It's fine. You were just that absorbed in it, right?
It's fine. You were just that absorbed in it, right?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yes…! My heart is still pounding even now… I think I'll write 
my next column for the student newspaper about this…
choice_data_list: <size=30>I'm looking forward to it! But don't push yourself too hard</size>.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: ……Ah. T-Thank you…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…Right, I… made Trainer worry again… After making 
them deliver my notebook, making them accompany 
me to a race in the rain…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Wait, could there be… a lot of other things that I…?)
